description: Built backend services and data pipelines using Java, Spring Boot, and AWS within Brokerage Technology. Designed a distributed logging library with trace ID propagation that reduced debugging time by ~75% across multiple teams. Shipped an event-driven analytics pipeline (SQS → Lambda → S3) processing 40M+ requests asynchronously, and built a dashboard surfacing actionable insights from S3-based payloads.

Delivered full-stack features using React, Node.js, and TypeScript across production apps. Built 'Find Teachers' — a job platform with OAuth, email automation, and PostgreSQL — launched with active beta users. Engineered S3 signed-URL uploads and AI proxy APIs for 'Space Re-Imagined', maintaining stability during a live expo demo.
Built automated test scripts using Java Selenium for 3+ modules. Gained hands-on experience with test automation, defect identification, and software testing best practices.
